name: Special Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and white sugar together until smooth.
2. Beat in the oil and powdered sugar, mixing until well combined.
3. Add the eggs and vanilla, then beat until thoroughly mixed.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt.
5. Stir the dry mixture into the butter mixture until just incorporated.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Flatten the cookies to about 1/4-inch thickness using a glass bottom dipped in sugar.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly browned around the edges.
Makes 6 to 7 dozen 3-inch cookies.
